instruction: Open Contacts and create a new contact with first name {FIRST} and last name {LAST}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §10 Contacts template); Tier-C AppleScript reads the contact's full name back

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Contacts" to delete (every person whose first name is "{FIRST}" and last name is "{LAST}")' -e 'tell application "Contacts" to save' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Contacts" to make new person with properties {first name:"{FIRST}", last name:"{LAST}"}' -e 'tell application "Contacts" to save' 2>/dev/null || true
